sections_cited: section 5 of the Sales Tax Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application 563 of 2011 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________  For hearing of main case 25.09.2025 None present This reference application is pending since 2011 without any progress. Applicant remains unrepresented without intimation or justification. Same appears to be the case for the last decade. In view of the judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of Commissioner Inland Revenue, Lahore vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of the Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge B-K Soomro
